author: Repository owner (human authorization in v2.0.0-alpha.2 release-preparation task brief)
reason: The human-authorized v2.0.0-alpha.2 release-preparation amendment advances only the protected release identity and command headers after acceptance of the additive campaign-capture implementation. Alpha.1 campaign artifacts, evidence, hashes, results, correction-lineage bytes, and verifier behavior remain unchanged; the frozen-zone amendment chain legitimately gains this append-only fz-v0.9.0 successor, and alpha.2 review artifacts remain explicitly unratified.
